SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELLEZ, KARLA RODRIGUEZ, JUAN CARLOS $1,306.47 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,383.97, DEFENDANTS KARLA TELLEZ AND JUAN CARLOS RODRIGUEZ ARE NOT PRESENT.
